GameID.description: The unique ID of this game

PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their MLB career

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this record corresponds to (1=Regular Season; 2=Preseason; 3=Postseason; 4=Offseason; 5=AllStar).

Season.description: The MLB season of the game

DateTime.description: The date and time of the game in US Eastern Time

Opponent.description: The name [Key] of the player's opponent in the game

HomeOrAway.description: Whether the team is home or away

Position.description: The player's position associated with the given game or season. Possible values: 1B, 2B, 3B, C, CF, DH, IF, LF, OF, P, PH, PR, RF, RP, SP, SS

PositionCategory.description: The player's position category. Possible values: DH; IF; OF; P; PH; PR

Games.description: The number of games played by the player. Note: for game feeds this will always = 1

Started.description: Whether the player started in the game. Note: started = 1 and not starting = 0

FantasyPoints.description: Total fantasy points by the player during the game

FantasyPointsBatting.description: Total batting fantasy points by the player in the game

FantasyPointsPitching.description: Total pitching fantasy points by the player in the game

IsGameOver.description: Whether or not the game is over (returns ture/false)

FantasyPointsFanDuel.description: Total FanDuel fantasy points by the player in the game

FantasyPointsYahoo.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points by the player in the game

FantasyPointsDraftKings.description: Total DraftKings fantasy points by the player in the game

FanDuelPosition.description: The player's eligible position in FanDuel's daily fantasy sports platform.

DraftKingsPosition.description: The player's eligible position in DraftKings' daily fantasy sports platform.

YahooPosition.description: The player's eligible position in Yahoo's daily fantasy sports platform

OpponentRank.description: The ranking of the player's opponent with regards to fantasy points allowed

OppositionPositionRank.description: The ranking of the player's opponent by position with regards to fantasy points allowed

GlobalGameID.description: A globally unique ID for this game. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.

Updated.description: The date and time of the late update made to this record (in US Eastern Time)
